rule_metadata.name: EXPL_Office_TemplateInjection_Aug19
rule_metadata.description: Detects possible template injections in Office documents, particularly those that load content from external sources
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule EXPL_Office_TemplateInjection_Aug19
{
	meta:
		old_rule_name = "EXPL_Office_TemplateInjection"
		description = "Detects possible template injections in Office documents, particularly those that load content from external sources"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1221/"
		date = "2019-08-22"
		modified = "2025-03-20"
		score = 75
		hash = "f2bdf3716b39d29a9c6c3b7b3355e935594b8d8e9149a784a59dc2381fa1628a"

	strings:
		$x1 = /attachedTemplate" Target="http[s]?:\/\/[^"]{4,60}/ ascii
		$fp1 = ".sharepoint.com"
		$fp2 = ".office.com"

	condition:
		filesize < 20MB and $x1 and not 1 of ( $fp* )
}
